sections.paragraph:
- Original: κατάκειμαι

- Transliteration: Katakeimai

- Phonetic: kat-ak'-i-mahee

- Definition:

1. to have lain down, i.e. to lie prostrate

a. of the sick

b. of those at meals, to recline

- Origin: from G2596 and G2749

- TDNT entry: 13:55,4

- Part(s) of speech: Verb

- Strong's: From G2596 and G2749; to lie down that is (by implication) be sick; specifically to recline at a meal: - keep lie sit at meat (down).
